# Product.Executable

**Class**

The executable product of a Swift package.

## Declaration

```swift
final class Executable
```

## Describing an executable product

- **targets**: The names of the targets in this product.

## Creating an Executable Product

- **executable(name:targets:)**: Creates an executable package product.

## Inherits From

- Product

## Conforms To

- Sendable
- SendableMetatype

items.description: The names of the targets in this product.
items.name: targets
